comment: "The most interesting aspect of this online course was learning about tranexamic acid, especially its mechanism of action in controlling bleeding and its wide range of clinical applications such as trauma, surgery, and obstetric hemorrhage. I also found it valuable to understand when it should and should not be used in different clinical situations.”
"This was a brilliant course. I enjoyed it very much and appreciate now how important it is."
"ALL the course was relevant.I mostly enjoyed knowing the different uses of TXA and the side effects of that product as well."
"I have learnt that tranexamic acid helps to reduce systemic inflammatory response."
